name: digital-colleague-m365
description: Safe cross-product Microsoft 365 workflows using official Codex Outlook, Teams, and SharePoint connectors.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Planner safely.
interface.longDescription: Set up and verify the official Outlook Email, Outlook Calendar, Microsoft Teams, and SharePoint connectors, then run bounded Microsoft 365 briefs, meeting follow-ups, and document workflows with review before external writes.
defaultPrompt: Use $m365-workspace-setup to verify my Microsoft 365 connections.
Use $m365-daily-brief for a bounded Outlook, Teams, Planner, and SharePoint brief.
Use $m365-meeting-followup to prepare reviewable follow-ups without sending them.
